thread.title_full: We will continue to work for security and stability in the Middle East – Al-Baath Media

author: archyworldyscom
title: We will continue to work for security and stability in the Middle East – Al-Baath Media
text:
Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi stressed that his country will continue to work to achieve security and stability in the Middle East and contribute more to maintaining peace in this region.
RIA Novosti quoted the words of the Chinese Foreign Minister during a symposium on China’s diplomatic work for the year 2023: “The fate of the Middle East is once again in the hands of the peoples of the countries of the region, and consultation and reconciliation are a fundamental question.” great victory for dialogue and peace”, underlining that “China has always been an active and reliable mediator, and not “Beijing has never relied on military force, has never pursued geopolitical interests and has never imposed its position to others.”
He added: “China always supports the people of the Middle East in resolving differences through dialogue,” stressing that his country “will continue to uphold security and stability in the Middle East and cooperate with the goal of development and prosperity and to contribute more to achieving reconciliation and peace in the region”.
#continue #work #security #stability #Middle #East #AlBaath #Media
